transcript:
Alice: We've decided to migrate to PostgreSQL by end of Q1.
Bob: I'll handle the schema migration. Target is March 15th.
Alice: One blocker — we don't have staging credentials yet.
Bob: I'll get those from DevOps by Monday.
Carol: We need to update the API docs before the client demo on Wednesday.

expected_signals.summary: Migrate to PostgreSQL by end of Q1
Bob will get staging credentials by Monday

expected_action_items.supporting_quote: I'll handle the schema migration. Target is March 15th
I'll get those from DevOps by Monday

expected_action_items.task: Update the API docs before client demo
expected_action_items.supporting_quote: we need to update the API docs before the client demo on Wednesday

transcript:
Dave: The API latency is above 500ms in production. That's a blocker for the release.
Eve: I can profile the slow queries this week and send a report.
Dave: We also committed to delivering the dashboard to the client by Thursday.
Eve: Got it. I'll prioritize the dashboard over the profiling.

expected_signals.summary: Deliver dashboard to client by Thursday

expected_action_items.task: Profile slow queries and send report
expected_action_items.supporting_quote: I can profile the slow queries this week and send a report
I'll prioritize the dashboard over the profiling
